title: Be cautious with fires in the windy weather
description: GEORGE NEWS - Due to the hot and windy...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Due to the hot and windy conditions experienced in George and surrounds today, we want to warn the public to be cautious in making fires and discarding cigarettes or matches.


> No controlled burns are allowed.


Any fires or emergency incidents should be immediately reported to the Fire Department:

- Fire only emergency number: 044 801 6311
- Emergency number: 044 801 6300
- Toll-free disaster number (24/7): 087 152 9999

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
